comparison_surface_note: Reads input id and official framed Configuration serverbound keep_alive payload from configuration_keepalive_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl, calls packet::send_keep_alive on a localhost Conn in State::Configuration, and compares observed TcpStream bytes to VarInt(official framed length) plus the official framed payload.
test_topology_note: This runtime-send manifest is intentionally below oracle/test-manifests/775/runtime because the current jar-backed runner only handles direct jar-regenerated cases and manifests.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::send_keep_alive(&mut Conn { state: State::Configuration, protocol_version: 775, compression_threshold: -1 }, official input id)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for outgoing Configuration keep_alive helper send only; not the spawn_reader echo loop.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves or fails the outgoing helper frame only; it does not prove runtime keep-alive echo behavior, Configuration completion, or Play entry.
